title: colubrina ruffa
intro: Colubrina ruffa, also known as the Rough Colubrina or Rough Smoothstem, is a shrub or small tree that belongs to the family Rhamnaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its various health benefits include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are prepared by infusing the leaves or roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
